# Tuned parameters — copy values manually into engine-core source files
# Generated by engine-tuner Texel tuning pipeline
# Final K = 2.999950

## MATERIAL (MG, EG)
Pawn     MG=100  EG=0
Knight   MG=101  EG=1
Bishop   MG=102  EG=2
Rook     MG=103  EG=3
Queen    MG=104  EG=4
King     MG=0  EG=0
